case_title: ALEXANDER MORALES VS. ELROY VARGAS TEJEDA et al

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, ALEXANDER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,327.13 FILED BY MORALES, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT TEJEDA, ELROY VARGAS CAMPOS, DORIS M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEJEDA, ELROY VARGAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JANETTE VARGAS-SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-29-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, DORIS M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEJEDA, ELROY VARGAS CAMPOS, DORIS M. $4,327.13 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,447.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TEJEDA, ELROY VARGAS CAMPOS, DORIS M.
